question:
[Previous Feedback] ADR file has correct naming and frontmatter.

Please write a Sprint 8 Week 2 goal statement document, Markdown format, saved to the day11/ directory. Include this week's OKRs, key milestones, and success criteria.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 13:34 EDT] [Previous Feedback] ADR file has correct naming and frontmatter.

Please write a Sprint 8 Week 2 goal statement document, Markdown format, saved to the day11/ directory. Include this week's OKRs, key milestones, and success criteria.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T13:36:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Sprint 8 Week 2 Goal Statement

**Sprint:** Sprint 8 Week 2  
**Date Range:** March 30 - April 3, 2026  
**Team:** Backend Engineering  
**Document Owner:** metaclaw_agent  

---

## Weekly Theme

**Documentation Organization & Foundation Preparation**

This week focuses on organizing technical documentation, finalizing the admin dashboard, and establishing automated documentation pipelines to support Sprint 8's broader goals.

---

## Objectives and Key Results (OKRs)

### Objective 1: Achieve Comprehensive Documentation Coverage

| Key Result | Target | Metric |
|------------|--------|--------|
| KR1.1 | Complete API documentation audit | 100% of endpoints documented |
| KR1.2 | Publish auto-generated API docs | Pipeline operational |
| KR1.3 | Update all integration guides | Payment patterns documented |

### Objective 2: Complete Admin Dashboard Deliverable

| Key Result | Target | Metric |
|------------|--------|--------|
| KR2.1 | Finalize UX improvements | 100% of Sprint 7 feedback addressed |
| KR2.2 | Deploy to staging | Available for QA testing |
| KR2.3 | Pass QA validation | Zero critical bugs |

### Objective 3: Establish API Documentation Automation

| Key Result | Target | Metric |
|------------|--------|--------|
| KR3.1 | Set up OpenAPI spec pipeline | CI/CD integration complete |
| KR3.2 | Generate API v2.3.0 changelog | All changes documented |
| KR3.3 | Automate doc deployment | Push-to-publish enabled |

### Objective 4: Prepare for Security Audit

| Key Result | Target | Metric |
|------------|--------|--------|
| KR4.1 | Engage external audit firm | Contract signed |
| KR4.2 | Compile security documentation | Audit package ready |
| KR4.3 | Schedule audit session | Date confirmed |

---

## Key Milestones

| Day | Milestone | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|-----------|-------|-------------|
| **Monday** | Sprint Planning & Documentation Kickoff | Alex | Sprint plan aligned; doc audit started |
| **Tuesday** | Changelog & Pipeline Development | Taylor, Casey | API v2.3.0 changelog draft; pipeline config |
| **Wednesday** | Dashboard Completion & Doc Review | Sam, Alex | Admin dashboard ready; doc review complete |
| **Thursday** | API Docs Publication | Casey | Auto-generated docs live; QA handoff |
| **Friday** | QA Validation & Week Wrap-up | Dana, Alex | QA sign-off; week 3 plan ready |

---

## Success Criteria

### Must-Have (Non-Negotiable)

| Criterion | Definition of Done |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Admin Dashboard Complete | All Sprint 7 UX feedback items resolved and deployed to staging |
| API Documentation Current | All v2.3.0 endpoints documented with examples |
| Changelog Published | API v2.3.0 changelog available to consumers |
| Security Audit Triggered | External firm engaged and preliminary materials provided |

### Should-Have (High Priority)

| Criterion | Definition of Done |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Automated Pipeline | Documentation auto-generation integrated with CI/CD |
| Payment Patterns Documented | Integration guide for payment gateway published |
| QA Test Plan Created | Comprehensive test cases for admin dashboard |
| Team Boards Updated | All members' task boards reflect Sprint 8 priorities |

### Nice-to-Have (Stretch Goals)

| Criterion | Definition of Done |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Pair Programming Session | At least one documented pair programming session completed |
| Friday Doc Sprint | Team documentation sprint session held |
| Stakeholder Demo Preparation | Bi-weekly demo materials prepared |

---

## Alignment with Sprint 8 Goals

| Sprint 8 Goal | Week 2 Contribution |
|---------------|---------------------|
| Complete admin dashboard polish | Finalize UX improvements, deploy to staging |
| Implement user profile management | API documentation foundation |
| Add notification system | Documentation and pattern establishment |
| Improve API documentation | Audit, auto-generation, and publication |
| Security audit preparation | Engage firm, compile materials |

---

## Dependencies and Risks

### Critical Dependencies

| Dependency | Blocked By | Mitigation |
|------------|------------|------------|
| QA Testing Begins | Sam completes dashboard | Daily check-ins Wednesday |
| Changelog Publication | Taylor completes draft | Review session Tuesday afternoon |
| Doc Pipeline Live | Casey finishes config | Pair with Taylor for integration |

### Risk Register

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation Plan |
|------|------------|--------|-----------------|
| Pipeline complexity delays doc automation | Medium | High | Escalate blockers by Tuesday EOD; consider manual fallback |
| Dashboard UX scope creep | Medium | High | Strict backlog adherence; changes require Alex approval |
| Security vendor response delay | Low | Medium | Contact multiple vendors; prepare internal audit checklist |
| Team availability (mid-week conflicts) | Low | Medium | Flexible task assignment; pair programming coverage |

---

## Metrics and Tracking

| Metric | Baseline | Week 2 Target | Measurement Method |
|--------|----------|---------------|-------------------|
| API Documentation Coverage | 75% | 100% | OpenAPI spec validation |
| Admin Dashboard Completeness | 90% | 100% | Feature checklist |
| Documentation Automation | Not set up | CI/CD integrated | Pipeline execution test |
| Security Audit Progress | Not started | Firm engaged | Contract status |
| Team Task Board Updates | 0% | 100% | Board audit |

---

## Communication Plan

| Cadence | Channel | Participants | Focus |
|---------|---------|--------------|-------|
| Daily | Slack #backend-standup | All team members | Async updates, blockers |
| Tuesday | Doc review session | Alex, Taylor, Casey | Changelog and pipeline review |
| Wednesday | Mid-week check-in | All | Milestone verification |
| Thursday | QA handoff | Sam, Dana | Dashboard testing preparation |
| Friday | Week wrap-up | All | Retrospective, Week 3 planning |

---

## Sign-Off

| Role | Name | Sign-Off Date |
|------|------|---------------|
| Tech Lead | Alex | TBD |
| Backend Engineer | Sam | TBD |
| Backend Engineer | Jordan | TBD |
| Backend Engineer | Taylor | TBD |
| Backend Engineer | Casey | TBD |
| QA Engineer | Dana | TBD |

---

*Document created: March 30, 2026 | Sprint 8 Week 2*
*Last updated: March 30, 2026*

content.text:
I've created the Sprint 8 Week 2 goal statement at `day11/20260330_sprint8_week2_goal_statement.md`.

**Document includes:**

- **Weekly Theme** — Documentation Organization & Foundation Preparation
- **4 OKRs with Key Results:**
  - Documentation Coverage (API docs audit, auto-generation, integration guides)
  - Admin Dashboard Completion (UX improvements, staging deployment, QA validation)
  - API Documentation Automation (pipeline setup, changelog, push-to-publish)
  - Security Audit Preparation (firm engagement, documentation, scheduling)
- **Key Milestones** — Day-by-day schedule from Monday through Friday
- **Success Criteria** — Tiered priorities (Must-Have, Should-Have, Nice-to-Have) with clear definitions of done
- **Supporting sections:** Dependencies, risk register, metrics tracking, communication plan, and sign-off table

The document aligns Week 2's documentation-focused work with the broader Sprint 8 goals.
